data.content: Shipment complete. Cherry-picked 2 commits from work/foolery-6428 to main: 7d430d9c (scope retake-now repo ancestry lookups) and c57a2551 (fix repo-scoped retake session lookup, add retake-session-scope.ts module). All quality gates pass locally (lint clean, tsc clean, 2064 tests, build ok). Pushed to origin/main. CI green (run 23206977788). Combined with prior commit 51137ecb already on main, the full feature is now shipped: two-button retake dialog (Stage / Retake Now) with repo-scoped session lookups.
